title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 11 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 11 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 11 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/12/2024
Today, the iron ore market underwent a contract rollover, with the most-traded contract switching to the I2505 contract.It remained stable in the morning but slightly declined in the afternoon. Throughout the day, it fluctuated downward, ultimately closing at 802, with a daily drop of 0.8%. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell, while steel mills purchased as needed.
